case_title: CLARK CHIQUITA VS MCGEE ODIEST HERE IN SUED AS MCGEE OTIS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARK CHIQUITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCGEE ODIEST HERE IN SUED AS MCGEE OTIS BOTH PARTIES TO BEAR OWN COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CLARK CHIQUITA AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE ODIEST HERE IN SUED AS MCGEE OTIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE ODIEST HERE IN SUED AS MCGEE OTIS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-01-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

parties.name: MCGEE ODIEST HERE IN SUED AS MCGEE OTIS 5968 MARSHALL OAKLAND, CA 94608
